shot_context.shot_emotion_summary: A tense moment of quiet realization; the character absorbs unwelcome news while maintaining composure.
shot_context.shot_motion_summary: Minimal upper-body movement. A slight forward lean and a single controlled hand gesture at chest height.

scene_context.visible_setting: Dimly lit restaurant interior, dark wood paneling, candlelight
scene_context.narrative_situation: A private conversation where uncomfortable truths surface

face_analysis.expression_caption: His expression shifts subtly across the shot. Initially composed with a neutral set to his mouth, his brows draw together slightly as he listens. By mid-shot, a faint tightening appears around the eyes — not quite a squint but a visible narrowing that suggests growing displeasure. His jaw sets incrementally, the masseter becoming defined. In the final frames, one corner of his mouth pulls down barely a millimeter, the only external sign of the contempt building beneath the surface. Throughout, his gaze remains fixed on the speaker, unblinking.

alternative_captions.direct: His brows draw together. His jaw tightens. The left corner of his mouth drops slightly. He does not blink.
alternative_captions.literary: Something hardens behind his eyes — not anger yet, but its architecture. His jaw locks by degrees, and when his lip finally moves, it is downward, a fraction, like a door closing on a conversation he has already ended internally.
alternative_captions.direction: Controlled disgust building over 4 seconds. Start neutral. Beat 1: inner brows down 2mm. Beat 2: jaw clench, visible masseter. Beat 3: left lip corner drop, barely perceptible. Eyes locked on scene partner throughout, no blink.
alternative_captions.situational: As if he has just confirmed a suspicion he hoped was wrong, and is now deciding how much of his disappointment to reveal — which turns out to be almost none.

facial_components.eyes: Narrowed slightly, inner corners tense, no tears, steady and unblinking
facial_components.eyebrows: Inner brows drawn slightly downward, left marginally lower than right
facial_components.mouth: Initially closed and neutral, then lips press together, left corner drops fractionally
facial_components.jaw: Progressive clenching, masseter visible by mid-shot

facial_attributes.distinctive_notes: Deep forehead lines visible under tension. Small scar above right eyebrow.

body_analysis.motion_caption: Almost entirely still throughout the shot. His shoulders are level and held slightly forward in a closed posture. In the middle frames, there is a barely perceptible forward lean of perhaps two centimeters — his upper body shifting weight toward the table without his arms moving. The neck remains rigid, supporting the fixed head position. No hand gesture is visible; both hands are below frame.

alternative_captions.direct: He sits still with shoulders slightly forward. A faint forward lean occurs mid-shot. No visible hand movement.
alternative_captions.literary: He is a study in stillness — only the body knows, tilting forward by a breath's width, as though pulled by the gravity of what he is hearing.
alternative_captions.direction: Closed posture, shoulders rolled inward. On the key line, micro-lean forward, 2cm max, from the waist. No arm movement. Hold tension in the trapezius throughout.
alternative_captions.situational: With the coiled restraint of someone who wants to lean across the table and grab the other person but has decided, very deliberately, not to.

upper_body_detail.head: Fixed, facing slightly left toward the other person, no tilt
upper_body_detail.shoulders: Level, slightly rolled forward in closed posture, no movement
upper_body_detail.torso: Slight forward lean developing mid-shot, approximately 2cm

body_analysis.gesture_detail: No gestures visible. Both arms are below the bust frame line.
